seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by awesome_books_001.
description: THE BEST COLORING BOOK FOR AGES 2 TO 4! Loads of Illustrations in big size with thick lines and simple to color into will nurture your child's talent and originality. The 100 coloring pages inspire children to be artistic and expressive. This groundbreaking coloring book is all about nurturing a child's creativity, imagination and spirit! Features & Highlights: Playful black-and-white line drawings explore multiple themes featuring animals, trees, food, toys, holiday themes and nature. Stimulating, educational and inspiring gift for any child between 2 to 4 years old. Studies show that coloring books can positively impact children's choices in the future while giving them an outlet for expression. Designed to inspire and evoke curiosity about exploration and adventure. A Great Gift for Any Child If you're looking for an activity for your toddler, preschooler or kindergartener, this coloring book will educate and entertain them. It s a creative way to engage in arts and crafts for children 2 to 4. Read more
